title: Syconn's Star Wars Mod
description: Travel To a world Far Away. Meet your favorite Star Wars Characters and adventure in custom dimensions and biome.
body:
![Star Wars Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/455cd98280349753c874d309393c044b410403e7.png)
# 📖 What's this Mod?
This is my brand new Star Wars Mod a fresh and clean remake of Past Versions. This mod will be for version 1.20+ and for most mod loaders. With inspiration from Galaxies a fabric mod, and conept ideas from Battlefront 2. I am excited to expierement and add ideas, mechanics and models/designs from other players and myself. Also feel free to leave ideas in the comments or perfered the discord. Report any issue perferable to the github and get ready to explore! And as always Enjoy and may the force be with you.

## 📷 Screenshots
![Lightsabers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLNjeXTm/images/5178b409d4ee915e324a36355f956f3b7ac521fe.png)

![Coloring Lightsabers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nLNjeXTm/images/f2a176614e88f3d7e6944ba3eaf1875d00a33476.png)

## 📢 Stay Up to Date!
Join the Discord for new features and Updates

https://discord.gg/9GUDtvsRmV


## ✅ Features:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Lightsabers
  
- Toggleable
- Throwable
- Data driven system to add custom lightsabers
- Block Projectiles
- Lightsaber Workstation to modify your lightsaber

</details>
